name: Suvidha Fixed Deposit
eligibility_notes: Resident individuals, HUFs, and minors accompanied by guardians.
description: Safe, liquid, and predictable returns with principal protection under DICGC guidelines up to 5 Lakhs.

name: Sovereign Gold Bond Index Fund
liquidity: Medium (Redeemable on stock exchanges after 1 day)
eligibility_notes: All Indian residents. Non-resident individuals not eligible.
description: Invests in gold bullion tracking Sovereign Gold Bonds, offering inflation hedge and capital safety.

name: Nifty 50 Index Fund
liquidity: High (Exit load of 0.25% if redeemed within 7 days)
eligibility_notes: Resident and Non-Resident Indians (NRI) with valid FATCA declarations.
description: Passive mutual fund tracking India's top 50 blue-chip companies, balancing growth and stability.

name: Flexi Cap Mutual Fund
eligibility_notes: Indian resident individuals and corporates seeking long-term capital appreciation.
description: Diversified equity scheme investing across large, mid, and small-cap segments for capital appreciation.

name: Portfolio Management Services (PMS) - Pioneer Fund
liquidity: Low (Exit load of 2% if redeemed within 1 year)
eligibility_notes: Sophisticated high-net-worth individuals. Mandated under SEBI PMS regulations.
description: Concentrated high-conviction mid and small-cap portfolio. Requires mandatory RM sign-off due to ticket size and complexity.
escalation_reason: SEBI regulations mandate detailed suitability profiling, manual contract verification, and physical sign-off for Portfolio Management Services (PMS) with minimum 50 Lakhs ticket size.

name: Alternative Investment Fund (AIF) - Real Estate Yield Fund
eligibility_notes: Qualified/Accredited individual and institutional investors under SEBI AIF Regulations, 2012.
description: Private equity alternative fund investing in commercial real-estate debt. Highly illiquid and restricted product.
escalation_reason: Alternative Investment Funds (AIF) are highly restricted products under SEBI regulations, requiring physical risk disclosure execution and accredited investor certification.
